attack_speed.description: Increase weapon fire rate for the current run.

damage_boost.description: Increase damage output for the current run.

bullet_velocity.description: Improve projectile speed. Runtime effect is currently informational.

shield_boost.description: Grant shield points that absorb incoming hits.

missile_cooldown.description: Reduce missile cooldown for the current run.

multi_shot.description: Increase multi-shot level for the current run.

piercing.description: Increase piercing level for the current run.

payload_expansion.description: Increase missile payload capacity for the current run.

overclock.description: Temporarily boost damage and attack speed for a set number of waves.

tech_credit_boost.description: Increase tech credit rewards for stage completion.
